info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API specification for the Ecommerce buildTime service, providing endpoints for managing product catalogs, orders, and customer data.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product catalog management.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing and tracking.

post.description: Registers a new user with the provided user information.

example.message: Provided user registration information is invalid
A user with the given email already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place an order for a user
post.description: Creates a new order placed by the specified user.

example.message: The order placement request contains invalid data

details.issue: User ID is missing or malformed

example.message: Cannot place order because the specified user was not found

details.issue: No user matching the given ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches the details of a specific order using its unique identifier.

example.message: The specified order ID does not exist

details.issue: Order ID does not match any existing orders

example.message: The order ID supplied is invalid
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId.

requestBody.description: Item to add to the cart

example.message: The cart item data provided is invalid

details.issue: Quantity must be greater than zero

example.message: Cannot add item because the specified user was not found

details.issue: No user matching the given ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches the current contents of the shopping cart for the specified user.

example.message: The specified user ID does not exist

details.issue: No user matching the given ID

example.message: The user ID supplied is invalid
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieve detailed tracking information and current status for the specified order using its unique identifier.

example.message: The order with the specified orderId does not exist.

details.issue: No order exists with the given orderId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create and add a new product with detailed specifications to the product catalog.

requestBody.description: Product object that needs to be added to the catalog

example.name: Ultra HD Television
example.description: 55-inch 4K Ultra HD Smart TV with HDR support

example.message: The product data submitted is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same name already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Endpoint to receive and process asynchronous payment event notifications from the payment gateway.

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Submit a request to start a new payment transaction with the specified payment details.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request containing payment details

example.message: Payment could not be processed due to declined funds.

details.issue: Funds were declined by the bank

example.message: The payment request contains invalid or missing fields.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message returned by the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Unique transaction identifier assigned by the payment gateway.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current fulfillment status of the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: User account creation date and time.

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

userType.description: Type/category of the user (e.g., admin, customer).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user's data.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

stock.description: Quantity of the product available in stock.

quantity.description: Number of units ordered of the product

price.description: Original price of a single unit before discount

finalPrice.description: Price per unit after applying discount

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart

price.description: Unit price of the product before any discounts

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier company handling the delivery

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the cart

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid in the specified currency.

orderId.description: A unique identifier for the order related to the payment.

paymentMethod.description: The method used for payment, such as credit card or PayPal.

currency.description: The currency code in which the payment is made, following ISO 4217 standards.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway or service used to process the payment.

country.description: The country of the user represented by the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

phone.description: The user's phone number including country code.

preferredCurrency.description: The user's preferred currency for transactions.

name.description: The full name of the user.

active.description: Indicates if the user's account is currently active.

userType.description: The classification of the user, e.g., admin, customer, guest.

email.description: The user's email address used for contact and login.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the payment was created in ISO 8601 format.

orderId.description: The identifier for the order associated with this payment.

paymentId.description: The unique identifier assigned to this payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for this transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the payment was made.

transactionId.description: The identifier of the transaction provided by the payment gateway.

status.description: The current status of the payment such as successful, failed, or pending.

createdAt.description: The date and time the product was created in ISO 8601 format.

productId.description: A unique identifier for the product.

price.description: The selling price of the product.

name.description: The name or title of the product.

rating.description: The average customer rating for the product, from 0 to 5.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

description.description: A detailed description of the product features and specifications.
description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation and 20 hours battery life.

currency.description: The currency code used for the product price.

category.description: The category or type of product.

stock.description: The number of products available in inventory.

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the product.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the product information was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

error.description: Short error phrase describing the client error

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

path.description: Request path that triggered the error

details.description: List of detailed issues related to the error

field.description: Name of the field causing the issue

error.description: Short error phrase describing the server error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the server error occurred
